framework.name: soc2_ai
framework.description: AICPA SOC 2 Trust Services Criteria extended with AI-specific considerations for security, availability, processing integrity, confidentiality, and privacy.

controls.name: soc2-cc1
controls.description: Demonstrate a commitment to integrity and ethical values for AI/ML systems.

controls.name: soc2-cc2
controls.description: Internal and external communication about AI controls and changes.

controls.name: soc2-cc6
controls.description: Restrict and monitor access to AI training data, models, and inference endpoints.

controls.name: soc2-cc7
controls.description: Monitor AI system performance, detect deviations, and respond appropriately.
